title: Apple incoming CEO John Ternus faces a defining challenge: Fixing the company's AI strategy
summary: Incoming Apple CEO John Ternus inherits a significant challenge to advance the company's AI strategy, an area where predecessor Tim Cook made limited progress. Ternus's technical background positions him to address this critical gap in Apple's competitive positioning.
content: Tim Cook had a highly successful tenure as Apple's CEO, but he leaves his successor with a big gap to fill when it comes to the company's position in AI.

zh.title: 苹果新任CEO约翰·泰勒努斯面临挑战：修复公司AI战略
zh.summary: 即将上任的苹果CEO约翰·泰勒努斯继承了一个重大挑战，需要推进公司的人工智能战略，这是前任CEO蒂姆·库克进展有限的领域。泰勒努斯的技术背景使他能够解决苹果竞争地位中的这一关键空缺。

title: UK unemployment rate sees surprise fall to 4.9%
summary: The UK unemployment rate unexpectedly fell to 4.9% in a surprise drop, defying analyst predictions that it would remain flat at 5.2%.
content: Most analysts had predicted the rate would remain unchanged at 5.2%.

zh.title: 英国失业率意外下降至4.9%
zh.summary: 英国失业率意外下降至4.9%，这一意外跌幅违背了分析师预测失业率将保持在5.2%的预期。

title: Pop-up shop helps families cope with rising costs
summary: A pop-up shop assists families struggling with rising costs by distributing tokens that enable customers to claim up to 10 free items ranging from clothing to household essentials.
content: Customers receive tokens to claim up to 10 free items, from clothing to everyday home essentials.

zh.title: 临时店铺帮助家庭应对生活成本上升
zh.summary: 一家临时店铺通过分发代币来帮助与生活成本上升作斗争的家庭，这些代币使顾客能够领取最多10件免费物品，包括服装和家用用品等。

title: European stocks to open higher as U.S.-Iran ceasefire deadline looms
summary: European stocks are forecast to open higher as investors assess the trajectory of US-Iran ceasefire negotiations and their implications for geopolitical stability and market risk.
content: European stocks are expected to open broadly higher on Tuesday as investors try to gauge the direction of efforts to end the U.S.-Iran war.

zh.title: 随着美伊停火期限迫近，欧洲股市开盘上涨
zh.summary: 随着投资者评估美伊停火谈判的进展及其对地缘政治稳定和市场风险的影响，欧洲股市预计开盘走高。

title: Charity offers 'stigma-free' food poverty service
summary: A Devon charity operates a stigma-reducing food bank where users select their own items rather than receive pre-packaged parcels, improving dignity and choice for food-insecure families.
content: The Devon charity shop lets food bank users select items rather than be given pre-prepared parcels.

zh.title: 慈善机构提供"无污名化"的食物贫困服务
zh.summary: 德文郡一家慈善机构运营一个消除污名的食物银行，用户可以自己选择物品而不是接收预打包的包裹，为粮食不安全的家庭提高了尊严和选择。

title: 'Price of red diesel is putting us in the red'
summary: Rising red diesel prices are forcing agricultural businesses to make difficult cost-cutting decisions, with one Lincolnshire grower reconsidering childcare arrangements due to squeezed margins.
content: Lincolnshire grower says rising costs have forced her to reconsider her son's nursery fees.

zh.title: "红色柴油的价格让我们陷入困境"
zh.summary: 红色柴油价格上升迫使农业企业做出困难的成本削减决定，林肯郡的一位农户因利润被挤压而重新考虑托儿安排。

title: Incoming Apple CEO John Ternus will play 'key role' in company's AI story: IDC
summary: IDC analyst Bryan Ma endorses incoming Apple CEO John Ternus for leading the company's AI initiatives, citing his technical expertise, while noting Tim Cook's continued role as executive chair provides stability in government relations.
content: Bryan Ma of IDC says investors have "the best of both worlds" with incoming Apple CEO John Ternus' technical and engineering background, as well as outgoing CEO Tim Cook remaining as the company's executive chairman to smoothen negotiations with government officials and suppliers.

zh.title: 苹果新任CEO约翰·特努斯将在公司AI战略中扮演"关键角色"：IDC分析师
zh.summary: IDC分析师布莱恩·马认可即将上任的苹果CEO约翰·特努斯领导公司AI计划，理由是他的技术专长，同时指出蒂姆·库克继续担任执行主席提供了政府关系的稳定性。

title: ‘New cards on the battlefield’: U.S., Iran ratchet up rhetoric with peace talks in limbo
summary: US and Iran intensify diplomatic rhetoric as peace talks stall ahead of a ceasefire deadline, with analysts warning that American negotiators may face tactical disadvantages against Iran's experienced diplomatic corps.
content: American negotiators may be outmatched at the negotiating table by Iran's experienced diplomatic delegation, says analyst, ahead of potential high-stakes meeting.

zh.title: "战场上的新筹码"：美国和伊朗升级言论，和平谈判陷入困境
zh.summary: 随着和平谈判在停火截止期前陷入停滞，美国和伊朗加强外交言论，分析人士警告美国谈判代表可能面临对伊朗经验丰富外交团队的战术劣势。

title: Nvidia supplier Victory Giant sees shares soar 60% in Hong Kong debut
summary: Victory Giant Technology, a key Nvidia supplier, experienced a 60% share surge on its Hong Kong stock exchange debut, marking the exchange's largest IPO of the year.
content: Shares of Victory Giant Technology surged in what is Hong Kong's largest initial public offering debut so far this year.

zh.title: 英伟达供应商威胜集团香港上市首日股价飙升60%
zh.summary: 关键英伟达供应商威胜集团在香港证券交易所上市首日经历了60%的股价上涨，创造了该交易所今年最大的IPO。

title: Bonds could lag stocks for the rest of 2026, according to this contrarian signal
summary: Record inflows into bond funds signal a contrarian warning that fixed income returns may underperform stocks for the remainder of 2026.
content: Record bond-fund inflows are a warning sign that lower returns are ahead.

zh.title: 根据这一逆向信号，债券在2026年剩余时间可能跑输股票
zh.summary: 流入债券基金的创纪录资金发出了逆向警告，预示固定收益回报在2026年剩余时间可能跑输股票

title: Okta’s stock is surging. Here’s why identity security has become the next hot thing.
summary: Okta's stock is surging as major investment banks turn bullish on the company, reflecting a revival in customer spending on identity security solutions after years of reduced investment.
content: Barclays turned bullish on Okta just days after Raymond James did, as customers are reinvigorating investment into identity security for the first time in years.

zh.title: Okta股价飙升。以下是身份安全为何成为下一个热点的原因
zh.summary: 主要投资银行转为看涨该公司，推动Okta股价飙升，反映了在多年投资缩减后，客户对身份安全解决方案支出的回暖

title: Oil falls as investors assess mixed messaging on Iran peace talks ahead of ceasefire deadline
summary: Oil prices declined as investors parse mixed signals about US-Iran peace negotiations ahead of the ceasefire deadline, unwinding sharp gains from the prior trading session.
content: West Texas Intermediate and Brent had settled 7% and 5% higher on Monday.

zh.title: 油价下跌，因投资者在停火期限前评估伊朗和平谈判的混合信号
zh.summary: 随着投资者在停火期限前分析美伊和平谈判的混合信号，油价下跌，此前交易时段的大幅涨幅被抹去

title: Government to propose electricity price changes in clean power push
summary: The British government proposes electricity price reforms as part of a clean energy initiative, driven by heightened concern about Britain's vulnerability to energy shocks from Middle East instability.
content: The war in the Middle East has brought renewed attention to Britain's vulnerability to energy price shocks.

zh.title: 政府提议电力价格改革以推进清洁能源
zh.summary: 英国政府提议电价改革作为清洁能源计划的一部分，由于对中东不稳定导致能源冲击的担忧加剧而推动。

title: Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer leaves Trump cabinet, Keith Sonderling takes over
summary: Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer resigned from the Trump administration, with Keith Sonderling taking over the role. The transition marks a significant Cabinet personnel change in the administration.
content: Department of Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer is resigning from the Trump administration, the White House said.

zh.title: 劳工部长洛丽·查韦斯-德雷默离开特朗普内阁，基思·松德林接任
zh.summary: 劳工部长洛丽·查韦斯-德雷默从特朗普政府辞职，基思·松德林接任该职位。此次更替标志着政府内阁人事发生重大变化。

title: Asia markets open higher as hopes for Iran peace talks offset Trump threat of escalation
summary: Asian markets opened higher on Tuesday as investors focused on hope for Iran peace talks, brushing aside Trump's escalatory rhetoric. The movement reflects cautious optimism about potential diplomatic resolution amid geopolitical tensions.
content: Asia markets opened higher Tuesday as investors brushed aside fresh threats from Trump on Iran ahead of a fragile ceasefire deadline.

zh.title: 伊朗和平谈判希望推高亚洲股市，抵消特朗普升级威胁
zh.summary: 周二亚洲股市上涨，投资者关注伊朗和平谈判的希望，暂时不理特朗普的升级言论。这一走势反映了在地缘政治紧张局势中对潜在外交解决的谨慎乐观态度。
